name: node-core-js
title: node-core-js
description:
Modular standard library for JavaScript
Includes polyfills for ECMAScript up to 2021: promises, symbols,
collections, iterators, typed arrays, ECMAScript 7+ proposals, setImmediate,
etc. Some additional features such as dictionaries or extended partial
application.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-core-js because Modular standard library for JavaScript.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-core-js as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-core-js with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-core-js --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
